issue.title: The footbridge to the vertical farm floods during storms
issue.description: The timber footbridge over Mill Creek is the only pedestrian route to the vertical-farm co-op. In storm season it floods roughly monthly, cutting off the farm crew and stranding produce deliveries. The bridge is a 60-year-old structure of communal significance. The node must decide how to respond.

context.historical: Bridge built 1966 by a community work-party; last reinforced 2009. Three flood closures already this season.
context.ecological: Mill Creek is a salmon-bearing watershed; in-stream works are constrained. New composite materials carry high embodied carbon.
context.resources: Reclaimed timber and a small steel stock are on hand; composite decking would be an external-dependency purchase.
context.labor: Roughly 140 skilled labor-hours available in the next planning window across the relevant co-ops.
context.dependencies: Vertical-farm co-op (food production) and the transport co-op (deliveries) both depend on this crossing.

proposals.label: Raise & reinforce the existing bridge in place
proposals.summary: Lift the existing timber deck above the 50-year flood line and reinforce the trusses, keeping the original structure.

proposals.label: Demolish and build a new elevated composite bridge
proposals.summary: Remove the old timber bridge and build a tall composite-deck crossing engineered well above any flood.

proposals.label: Abandon the bridge and reroute the path around the ridge
proposals.summary: Stop maintaining the bridge; establish a longer all-weather path around via the ridge.

proposals.label: Seasonal modular floating walkway
proposals.summary: Bridge-step auto-generated option: deploy a demountable floating walkway only during storm season; store it otherwise.

constraints.name: accessibility_floor
constraints.message: Access for elderly and disabled members must be preserved (node constitution).

constraints.name: ecological_budget
constraints.message: Embodied-carbon / watershed impact exceeds the node's ecological budget.

constraints.name: labor_budget
constraints.message: Estimated labor+material burden exceeds the available planning-window budget.

constraints.name: heritage_review_required
constraints.message: Removing a structure older than 50 years requires a heritage review before it may proceed.
